description: Orchestrator: interactive menu to pick tools, or install everything at once.

messages.menuTitle: Install All Dev Tools -- Interactive Menu
messages.menuPrompt: Numbers (1,2,5), group letter (a-f), A=all, N=none, Q=quit, Enter=run:
messages.menuLoopBack: Returning to menu... (select more or press Q to exit)
messages.dryRunBanner: --- DRY RUN -- no changes will be made ---
messages.dryRunComplete: Dry run complete. {count} script(s) would be executed.
messages.uninstallMenuTitle: Select tools to UNINSTALL (check items then press Enter):
messages.uninstallSkipChoco: Skipping script {id}: {name} (Chocolatey cannot be uninstalled -- it would break the uninstall chain)
messages.uninstallDryRunBanner: --- UNINSTALL DRY RUN -- no changes will be made ---

commands.(default): Interactive menu -- pick what to install
commands.-All: Run all enabled scripts without prompting
commands.-DryRun: Show what would be installed without making changes
commands.-Uninstall: Batch uninstall tools (interactive picker or with -All/-Only)
commands.-Uninstall -DryRun: Show what would be uninstalled without making changes
